items.title: ASC has 6 unscheduled days in next 14d
ASC: 2 scheduled slot(s) past their fire time
items.detail: Tracker says scheduled but scheduled_for is in the past. With API live, run `python scripts/reconcile_past_fire.py --niche asc` to auto-fix. First few: #52 (2026-05-14 11:00, 46.0h ago), #54 (2026-05-15 11:00, 22.0h ago).
